prompt: Create a professional 6-panel carousel titled 'Agentic DevOps Beyond CI/CD'. Sequence: 1) CI/CD is not the whole system; 2) Delivery risk is the executive concern; 3) Signals include quality, dependencies, vulnerabilities, environment, compliance, and rollback readiness; 4) Agentic DevOps coordinates those signals; 5) Governance belongs inside the flow of work; 6) Governed delivery is more valuable than raw speed. Use restrained enterprise design and clear progression.
proof_boundaries: Do not claim measured delivery improvements or risk reduction.
Do not imply current tools autonomously govern releases without human oversight.
Treat the content as an architectural framework pending current technical verification.
